title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Cars24 - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Cars24 - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!
